inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: The price at which the property is purchased.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price at which the property is purchased.
businessContext_i18n.de: Preis, zu dem die Immobilie gekauft wird.

inputs.label: Rehab Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of renovations and repairs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of renovations and repairs.

inputs.label: After Repair Value (ARV)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated market value of the property after renovations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated market value of the property after renovations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yenileme sonrası mülkün tahmini piyasa değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Marktwert der Immobilie nach Renovierungen.

inputs.label: Operating Expense Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of monthly rent reserved for operating expenses (taxes, insurance, maintenance, vacancy, management).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of monthly rent reserved for operating expenses (taxes, insurance, maintenance, vacancy, management).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşletme giderleri (vergiler, sigorta, bakım, boşluk, yönetim) için ayrılan aylık kira yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der monatlichen Miete, der für Betriebskosten (Steuern, Versicherung, Instandhaltung, Leerstand, Verwaltung) reserviert ist.

inputs.label: Refinance LTV
inputs.businessContext: Loan-to-value ratio for refinancing, expressed as a percentage of ARV.

businessContext_i18n.en: Loan-to-value ratio for refinancing, expressed as a percentage of ARV.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden finansman için kredi-değer oranı, ARV'nin yüzdesi olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Beleihungsquote für die Refinanzierung, ausgedrückt als Prozentsatz des ARV.

inputs.label: Refinance Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate for the refinance mortgage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual interest rate for the refinance mortgage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden finansman ipoteği için yıllık faiz oranı.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the refinance loan in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the refinance loan in years.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden finansman kredisinin yıl cinsinden süresi.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
